definition.purpose: Make every work cycle evidence-seeking, bounded, learning-producing, and feedback-driven.

codexNativeLoop.useWhen: interactive Codex TUI/session can maintain a persisted goal workflow

autonomousCodingGuide.plannerRole: human/user defines intent and reviews business fit
autonomousCodingGuide.codexRole: Codex performs analysis, planning, implementation, validation, and evidence reporting

stages.name: Stage 1. Analysis
stages.purpose: Understand repository structure, conventions, current state, and target objective before editing.

stages.name: Stage 2. Deep Interview
stages.purpose: Turn vague intent into explicit requirements, edge cases, data sources, UI location, and human gates.

stages.name: Stage 3. Ralph Plan
stages.purpose: Create a bounded implementation plan and success criteria before autonomous execution.

stages.name: Stage 4. Ralph Run / Execute & Vision
stages.purpose: Implement, run tests, use Playwright/browser evidence where UI is involved, and iterate.

stages.name: Stage 5. Finalize
stages.purpose: Summarize evidence, surface remaining decisions, update issue/PR/runtime outputs, and stop at approval gates.

focus.primaryActionTitle: 라이프 에이전트화를 scope 단위에서 domain 단위로 승격
focus.strategicDirection: Stop page-only progress; create the next verified replacement candidate from live runtime evidence.

stages.label: Review
stages.purpose: Read only the changed/runtime evidence needed for the current task, not every artifact.
stages.output: ranked bottleneck and current primary action

stages.label: Act
stages.purpose: Perform the smallest bounded action that improves replacement evidence or reduces a bottleneck.
stages.output: bounded implementation, route, or artifact update
stages.currentSignal: 라이프 에이전트화를 scope 단위에서 domain 단위로 승격
stages.hardStop: Do not merge, close, deploy, publish, spend, expose secrets, or mutate external systems unless explicitly approved.

stages.label: Learn
stages.purpose: Convert the result into reusable evidence, metrics, docs, or knowledge graph entries.

stages.label: Feedback
stages.purpose: Report only meaningful deltas, update PR/issue evidence, and feed the next cycle.
stages.output: next cycle command list and concise operator summary

commandSequence: For ambiguous work: run analysis/deep interview before /goal
stopConditions: candidate action would only add a page without runtime evidence
